notes: v0.3.7 CRITICAL FIX: v0.3.6 video clips could crash the entire PC on playback because MediaRecorder was producing multi-GB files at unbounded bitrate and the frontend→Rust IPC was sending them as JSON number arrays with 5-10x bloat. DELETE any .webm files from your v0.3.6 recording session before installing — do not try to play them. v0.3.7 hard-caps video bitrate at 2 Mbps and audio at 128 kbps, switches IPC to base64 via FileReader (predictable and lean), prefers VP8 over VP9 for Windows Media Player / Films & TV compatibility, and adds a 250 MB frontend guard + on-disk size verification in Rust. Audio recording path untouched.
